_comment: Risk / review rules for the Findings Engine. Each rule fires when a signal crosses a threshold and produces a Finding: fact + evidence + severity + points deducted from a 100 baseline. Community-extensible via this JSON. The 'recommendation' for each finding is intentionally NOT here — recommendations are a Professional capability; Community states the fact and its impact, Pro says what to do about it.

rules.impact: Higher inventory, sourcing, and assembly complexity; more unique items to manage.
Manufacturing cost and lead time driven by in-house machined parts rather than off-the-shelf items.
rules.evidence_template: {custom_pct}% of classified instances are custom (in-house) parts

rules.impact: Deeper nesting can complicate assembly sequencing and rework.
More physical parts to procure, handle, and assemble.
Supply-chain risk if one vendor supplies a large share of identified commercial parts.
rules.evidence_template: top vendor {top_vendor} covers {max_vendor_share}% of vendor-matched parts
